ats_utilities.logger.engine module¶

Module

engine.py

Copyright

Info

Defines class Logger with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the logging mechanism.

class ats_utilities.logger.engine.Logger(component_bundle: LoggerBundle)[source]¶

Bases: ILogger

Defines class Logger with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the logging mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
_logger - Logger instance.
_log_methods - Mapping of log levels to log methods.
_early_logs_buffer - Buffer for early logs.
_has_file_handler - Flag indicating if logger has a file handler.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Logger constructor.
_process_message - Processes the log message by checking the environment.
write_log - Writes message to log.
is_initialized - Checks if logger is initialized.
set_level - Sets log level.
set_log_file - Sets log file.
stop_buffering - Stops log buffering.
__str__ - Returns the logger as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_early_logs_buffer: list[tuple[str, int]]¶
_has_file_handler: bool¶
_log_methods: Mapping[int, Callable[[...], None]]¶
_logger: Any¶
_process_message(message: str) → str[source]¶

Processes the log message by checking the environment. Stripping ANSI color codes and emojis if output is redirected or disabled.

Parameters:

message (<str>) – The original log message.

Returns:

The processed (clean or untouched) log message.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if logger is initialized.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

set_level(level: int) → None[source]¶

Sets log level.

Parameters:

level (<int>) – Log level.

Exceptions:

None.

set_log_file(log_file: str) → None[source]¶

Sets log file.

Parameters:

log_file (<str>) – Log file path.

Exceptions:

None.

stop_buffering() → None[source]¶

Stops log buffering.

Exceptions:

None.

write_log(message: str, ctrl: int) → None[source]¶

Writes message to log.

Parameters:

  • message (<str>) – Log message in string format for log.

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info).

Exceptions:

None.
